videos.title: Street Fighter 6 - Ingrid Teaser Trailer
videos.description:
Your fate shall soon be linked. Ingrid, the final character to join the Street Fighter 6 Year 3 roster, is finally making her debut in late spring 2026!

We’re excited to share a first glimpse that highlights her mysterious, yet charming presence.

What is this place? What exactly is a Monoid? And who is she, really...?
Stay tuned for more details coming soon! Bye-onara for now!

https://www.streetfighter.com/6/

#StreetFighter6 #SF6 #Ingrid #Capcom 

Twitter:   / streetfighter  
Discord:   / discord  
Instagram:   / streetfightergame  
Facebook:   / streetfighter  
Twitch:   / capcomfighters  

©CAPCOM CO., LTD. ALL RIGHTS RESERVED.
videos.transcript: Pesquisar transcrição This world is supposed to be completely uninhabited. Odd though, how did a Terran like you end up in a whole other world? Come on. Oh, I thought I'd never ever ever see you again. Curiouser and curiouser. Now I understand. Touching this monoid has linked our fates. Maybe we should revisit this another time. Not that you'd [music] understand anyway. But for now, we should be able to send you back to your world without a hitch. Simply put, [music] since you're now the sole occupant of this wide and empty world, if I consign said world to oblivion, you should remain totally free from harm. Now, this is not a goodbye. As long as our fates are linked, we can meet again. Should you wish [music] to do so, seek out my monoids. Until next time. Bye. And [music]

videos.title: REACT: O QUE INGRID SIGNIFICA PARA O FUTURO DE STREET FIGHTER 6?
videos.description:
Nesse vídeo Vini reage ao trailer de apresentação de Ingrid, a última personagem da Season 3 de Street Fighter 6, ainda sem data de lançamento.

#streetfighter #sf6 #ingrid
-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

Músicas e efeitos desse vídeo como cortesia de:

Theme of Nova, from Ultimate Marvel vs. Capcom 3, by Capcom

-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

Obrigado por assistir!
videos.transcript: Pesquisar transcrição Salve salve galera, eu não achei que esse seria o primeiro vídeo que eu gravaria depois de voltar de lua de mel, mas a Capcom acabou de postar um teaser da Ingrid, então a gente precisa ver como que a boneca tá em Street Fighter 6. Normalmente eu não vejo trailer com legenda, mas eu sinto que esse aqui vai ser importante. Como um terrar como você parou em outro universo. Uma monoide. Cara, o modelo dela tá bem legal. O cara esse monoide ligou nossos destinos. [música] Mandar você de volta pro seu mundo. Joinha para você. Você é o único habitante desse mundo. Relegar esse mundo a esquecimento. Olha isso, meu amigo. Que que vai ser essa boneca, hein, galera? simplesmente brincando com a realidade. Enquanto nossos destinos ficarem conectados, podemos nos reencontrar. Basta procurar minhas monoides. Até mais. [música] Tchauzinho. Da hora. Não entendi foi nada, mas tudo bem. Galera, o modelo da Ingrid tá bem legal e dá para ver que, tipo assim, a boneca ela vai preservar o status de Deus assim do universo do de Street Fighter, né? Parece que ela vai ser essa essa entidade sobrenatural, porque pelo menos no Alfa 3, né, ela parece como a personagem que, digamos assim, a razão da existência do Psychopower. E o Byon é só uma pessoa que, né, só um ser humano normal que conseguiu de alguma forma utilizar esse poder. Olha que fofinha. Não se enganem. Essa boneca já tem cara de que vai ser cretina. Mas assim, o Bison é só um usuário do do Psycho Power. A Ingrid, pelo menos na história do Alfa 3, ela é a razão da existência do Psycho Power. Ela pode manipular a realidade e dá para ver isso claramente nesse trailer, né? Ela faz, ela brinca com a realidade. Quando ela quer, pum, bota uma luzinha na cabeça, ó, efeitos, ela manipula a realidade do jeito que ela quer. Então, ela realmente é um personagem que provavelmente vai preservar esse status. Não que isso esteja canonizando a história dela de Alfa 3, né, que aquela história dela no Alfa 3 provavelmente não é canônica, mas pelo menos a essência da personagem é a mesma. Se a história, se algum aspecto da história do Alfa 3 é canônica, a gente deve descobrir realmente aí em Street Fighter 6, no World Tour e tudo mais. Ó, olha só como que ela brinca com a realidade do jeito que ela quer. E no Alpha 3, né, apesar dela ter originado lá no Capcom Fighting Evolution, no Alpha 3, ela também tem esse aspecto, ser um personagem fofinho, mas na verdade isso aí é só um um disfarce, né, digamos assim, que ela é um personagem muito poderoso e parece que a Capcon vai manter essa direção para ela. Bem legal mesmo o modelo. A gente sabe que esses trailers de World Tour não revelam muita coisa, né? Eu me pergunto se, por exemplo, esse trailer pode ter implicações aí pro futuro da franquia. Vamos supor que, nossa, agora ela tá mexendo com a realidade, mete aí uns personagens de crossover muito doidos, não só esses crossovers que a gente tem dentro do universo de Street Fighter, né? Quando, por exemplo, aparece um C, um Guy, uma Akira, como foi no Street Fighter 5, mas vai que outras franquias da Capcom, né? Ou vai que outras franquias de fora que não tem às vezes a ver muito com o jogo de luta e por causa da Ingrid brincando com o espaço tempo, essas coisas se tornam possíveis. Eu não sei, eu ninguém sabe na verdade, né? Mas tipo, é o tipo de coisa que passa pela minha cabeça e não tem muito o que a gente falar sobre a Ingrid a não ser isso. Na história dela do Alpha 3, ela acaba como o Byon recupera o Psycho Power que é dela de direito e vai aí através do universo fazer coisas de Ingrid. E olha aí, ó. Olha esse take. Ela simplesmente abrindo uma porta, um portal, um sei lá o que que esse portal faz, aonde ele leva, mas dá para ver que é um ser cósmico que tá diante da gente e não o o seu mero lutador de Ansatsuken que taca Haduken e da Shoruken, que já é uma coisa absurda, né, em termos de realidade. Mas a Ingrid, ela é absurda até em termos de Street Fighter. Então eu tô muito curioso para ver o que que essa boneca vai trazer aí pro jogo. Em termos de arquétipo não dá para saber, mas pode ter certeza que ela vai ser do tipo que é bem maluco, bem alucinado. Talvez do tipo da menate. Esses personagens que t muita gimic, muito macete, né? Com essa pegada de anime fighter, esse tipo de coisa. Um talvez um puppet, mas é impossível a gente saber. Então eu gostaria de saber a opinião de vocês, o que que vocês acham, né? Quais são as teorias de vocês sobre a Ingrid? Eu gostaria muito que com a Ingrid viesse o Super Street Fighter 6. Isso seria muito legal, né? Mas fora isso, a gente não tem como especular muito. Dá para ver que ela realmente vai ser esse personagem absurdo. Mas o que essa o que essa personagem significa pro futuro da franquia? Se ela impacta de alguma forma os DLCs futuros? Isso é tudo especulação da minha parte e tem outras pessoas especulando sobre isso também. Então eu adoraria de saber o que vocês acham em relação a Ingrid, quais são as teorias malucas da conspiração que vocês têm sobre esse personagem. me conta nos comentários, deixa um like nesse vídeo e estamos junto. Vamos agora esperar pelo trailer de gameplay dela. Valeu,

videos.title: 🔥 SF6 ▰ MENARD (Blanka) vs DAIGO (Akuma) ▰ Street Fighter League: World Championship 2025 - Day2
videos.description:
🔥 SF6 — Beast Instinct vs Demon Power: MenaRD vs Daigo | World Championship Clash 🔥

The legends collide on the global stage—
where every moment carries weight.

MENARD unleashes Blanka,
wild, explosive, and impossible to predict.

DAIGO answers with Akuma,
a master of precision, discipline, and devastating offense.

Electric pressure.
Demonic strikes.
Momentum that can end rounds in seconds.

This is chaos vs mastery—
where instinct clashes with pure fundamentals.

One mistake…
is all it takes.

videos.title: AngryBird vs. Leshar | Street Fighter 6 at EWC 25 - Day 4 - Third Place Match
videos.description:
The Esports World Cup is back to write the next chapter in esports history!
Witness the world’s top clubs and players compete for over $70,000,000 in prize money and the coveted EWC Club Championship trophy.
Catch all the action live this summer!

📍 Boulevard Riyadh City
🗓️ July 7th - August 24th, 2025
🎟️ https://webook.com/en/events/esports-...

▶ More at:
♦ EWC: https://esportsworldcup.com
♦ X: https://x.com/EWC_EN & https://x.com/EWC_Extra
♦ Instagram:   / ewc_en   &   / ewc_extra  
♦ TikTok:   / ewc_en&     / ewc_extra  
♦ Facebook:   / esportsworldcup  

#EsportsWorldCup #EWC25

The Esports World Cup is back to write the next chapter in esports history!
Witness the world’s top clubs and players compete for over $70,000,000 in prize money and the coveted EWC Club Championship trophy.
Catch all the action live this summer!

📍 Boulevard Riyadh City
🗓️ July 7th - August 24th, 2025

♦ TikTok:   / ewc_en&     / ewc_extra  
♦ Facebook:   / esportsworldcup

The Esports World Cup is back to write the next chapter in esports history!
Witness the world’s top clubs and players compete for over $70,000,000 in prize money and the coveted EWC Club Championship trophy.

videos.title: AngryBird vs. Leshar | Street Fighter 6 at EWC 25 - Day 4 - Third Place Match
videos.description:
The Esports World Cup is back to write the next chapter in esports history!
Witness the world’s top clubs and players compete for over $70,000,000 in prize money and the coveted EWC Club Championship trophy.
Catch all the action live this summer!

📍 Boulevard Riyadh City
🗓️ July 7th - August 24th, 2025
🎟️ https://webook.com/en/events/esports-...

♦ TikTok:   / ewc_en&     / ewc_extra  
♦ Facebook:   / esportsworldcup  

#EsportsWorldCup #EWC25

The Esports World Cup is back to write the next chapter in esports history!
Witness the world’s top clubs and players compete for over $70,000,000 in prize money and the coveted EWC Club Championship trophy.

The Esports World Cup is back to write the next chapter in esports history!
Witness the world’s top clubs and players compete for over $70,000,000 in prize money and the coveted EWC Club Championship trophy.
Catch all the action live this summer!

🗓️ July 7th - August 24th, 2025

♦ Facebook:   / esportsworldcup

videos.title: AngryBird vs. Leshar | Street Fighter 6 at EWC 25 - Day 4 - Third Place Match
videos.description:
The Esports World Cup is back to write the next chapter in esports history!
Witness the world’s top clubs and players compete for over $70,000,000 in prize money and the coveted EWC Club Championship trophy.
Catch all the action live this summer!

📍 Boulevard Riyadh City
🗓️ July 7th - August 24th, 2025
🎟️ https://webook.com/en/events/esports-...

▶ More at:
♦ EWC: https://esportsworldcup.com
♦ X: https://x.com/EWC_EN & https://x.com/EWC_Extra
♦ Instagram:   / ewc_en   &   / ewc_extra  
♦ TikTok:   / ewc_en&     / ewc_extra  
♦ Facebook:   / esportsworldcup  

#EsportsWorldCup #EWC25

videos.title: Blaz vs. Leshar | Street Fighter 6 at EWC 25 - Day 4 - Semifinals
videos.description:
The Esports World Cup is back to write the next chapter in esports history!
Witness the world’s top clubs and players compete for over $70,000,000 in prize money and the coveted EWC Club Championship trophy.
Catch all the action live this summer!

📍 Boulevard Riyadh City
🗓️ July 7th - August 24th, 2025
🎟️ https://webook.com/en/events/esports-...

▶ More at:
♦ EWC: https://esportsworldcup.com
♦ X: https://x.com/EWC_EN & https://x.com/EWC_Extra
♦ Instagram:   / ewc_en   &   / ewc_extra  
♦ TikTok:   / ewc_en&     / ewc_extra  
♦ Facebook:   / esportsworldcup  

#EsportsWorldCup #EWC25

The Esports World Cup is back to write the next chapter in esports history!
Witness the world’s top clubs and players compete for over $70,000,000 in prize money and the coveted EWC Club Championship trophy.
Catch all the action live this summer!

🗓️ July 7th - August 24th, 2025

videos.title: AngryBird vs. Leshar | Street Fighter 6 at EWC 25 - Day 4 - Third Place Match
videos.description:
The Esports World Cup is back to write the next chapter in esports history!
Witness the world’s top clubs and players compete for over $70,000,000 in prize money and the coveted EWC Club Championship trophy.
Catch all the action live this summer!

📍 Boulevard Riyadh City
🗓️ July 7th - August 24th, 2025
🎟️ https://webook.com/en/events/esports-...

▶ More at:
♦ EWC: https://esportsworldcup.com
♦ X: https://x.com/EWC_EN & https://x.com/EWC_Extra
♦ Instagram:   / ewc_en   &   / ewc_extra  
♦ TikTok:   / ewc_en&     / ewc_extra  
♦ Facebook:   / esportsworldcup  

#EsportsWorldCup #EWC25

The Esports World Cup is back to write the next chapter in esports history!
Witness the world’s top clubs and players compete for over $70,000,000 in prize money and the coveted EWC Club Championship trophy.
Catch all the action live this summer!

🗓️ July 7th - August 24th, 2025

The Esports World Cup is back to write the next chapter in esports history!
Witness the world’s top clubs and players compete for over $70,000,000 in prize money and the coveted EWC Club Championship trophy.

videos.title: AngryBird vs. Leshar | Street Fighter 6 at EWC 25 - Day 4 - Third Place Match
videos.description:
The Esports World Cup is back to write the next chapter in esports history!
Witness the world’s top clubs and players compete for over $70,000,000 in prize money and the coveted EWC Club Championship trophy.
Catch all the action live this summer!

📍 Boulevard Riyadh City
🗓️ July 7th - August 24th, 2025
🎟️ https://webook.com/en/events/esports-...

▶ More at:
♦ EWC: https://esportsworldcup.com
♦ X: https://x.com/EWC_EN & https://x.com/EWC_Extra
♦ Instagram:   / ewc_en   &   / ewc_extra  
♦ TikTok:   / ewc_en&     / ewc_extra  
♦ Facebook:   / esportsworldcup  

#EsportsWorldCup #EWC25

The Esports World Cup is back to write the next chapter in esports history!
Witness the world’s top clubs and players compete for over $70,000,000 in prize money and the coveted EWC Club Championship trophy.
Catch all the action live this summer!

videos.title: AngryBird vs. Leshar | Street Fighter 6 at EWC 25 - Day 4 - Third Place Match
videos.description:
The Esports World Cup is back to write the next chapter in esports history!
Witness the world’s top clubs and players compete for over $70,000,000 in prize money and the coveted EWC Club Championship trophy.
Catch all the action live this summer!

📍 Boulevard Riyadh City
🗓️ July 7th - August 24th, 2025
🎟️ https://webook.com/en/events/esports-...

▶ More at:
♦ EWC: https://esportsworldcup.com
♦ X: https://x.com/EWC_EN & https://x.com/EWC_Extra
♦ Instagram:   / ewc_en   &   / ewc_extra  
♦ TikTok:   / ewc_en&     / ewc_extra  
♦ Facebook:   / esportsworldcup  

#EsportsWorldCup #EWC25

videos.title: Blaz vs. Leshar | Street Fighter 6 at EWC 25 - Day 4 - Semifinals
videos.description:
The Esports World Cup is back to write the next chapter in esports history!
Witness the world’s top clubs and players compete for over $70,000,000 in prize money and the coveted EWC Club Championship trophy.
Catch all the action live this summer!

📍 Boulevard Riyadh City
🗓️ July 7th - August 24th, 2025
🎟️ https://webook.com/en/events/esports-...

▶ More at:
♦ EWC: https://esportsworldcup.com
♦ X: https://x.com/EWC_EN & https://x.com/EWC_Extra
♦ Instagram:   / ewc_en   &   / ewc_extra  
♦ TikTok:   / ewc_en&     / ewc_extra  
♦ Facebook:   / esportsworldcup  

#EsportsWorldCup #EWC25

The Esports World Cup is back to write the next chapter in esports history!
Witness the world’s top clubs and players compete for over $70,000,000 in prize money and the coveted EWC Club Championship trophy.

videos.title: AngryBird vs. Leshar | Street Fighter 6 at EWC 25 - Day 4 - Third Place Match
videos.description:
The Esports World Cup is back to write the next chapter in esports history!
Witness the world’s top clubs and players compete for over $70,000,000 in prize money and the coveted EWC Club Championship trophy.
Catch all the action live this summer!

📍 Boulevard Riyadh City
🗓️ July 7th - August 24th, 2025
🎟️ https://webook.com/en/events/esports-...

▶ More at:
♦ EWC: https://esportsworldcup.com
♦ X: https://x.com/EWC_EN & https://x.com/EWC_Extra
♦ Instagram:   / ewc_en   &   / ewc_extra  
♦ TikTok:   / ewc_en&     / ewc_extra  
♦ Facebook:   / esportsworldcup  

#EsportsWorldCup #EWC25

videos.description:
The Esports World Cup is back to write the next chapter in esports history!
Witness the world’s top clubs and players compete for over $70,000,000 in prize money and the coveted EWC Club Championship trophy.
Catch all the action live this summer!

📍 Boulevard Riyadh City
🗓️ July 7th - August 24th, 2025

♦ TikTok:   / ewc_en&     / ewc_extra  
♦ Facebook:   / esportsworldcup

The Esports World Cup is back to write the next chapter in esports history!
Witness the world’s top clubs and players compete for over $70,000,000 in prize money and the coveted EWC Club Championship trophy.

videos.description:
The Esports World Cup is back to write the next chapter in esports history!
Witness the world’s top clubs and players compete for over $70,000,000 in prize money and the coveted EWC Club Championship trophy.
Catch all the action live this summer!

📍 Boulevard Riyadh City
🗓️ July 7th - August 24th, 2025
🎟️ https://webook.com/en/events/esports-...

♦ TikTok:   / ewc_en&     / ewc_extra  
♦ Facebook:   / esportsworldcup  

#EsportsWorldCup #EWC25

videos.title: Blaz vs. Leshar | Street Fighter 6 at EWC 25 - Day 4 - Semifinals
videos.description:
The Esports World Cup is back to write the next chapter in esports history!
Witness the world’s top clubs and players compete for over $70,000,000 in prize money and the coveted EWC Club Championship trophy.
Catch all the action live this summer!

📍 Boulevard Riyadh City
🗓️ July 7th - August 24th, 2025
🎟️ https://webook.com/en/events/esports-...

▶ More at:
♦ EWC: https://esportsworldcup.com
♦ X: https://x.com/EWC_EN & https://x.com/EWC_Extra
♦ Instagram:   / ewc_en   &   / ewc_extra  
♦ TikTok:   / ewc_en&     / ewc_extra  
♦ Facebook:   / esportsworldcup  

#EsportsWorldCup #EWC25

The Esports World Cup is back to write the next chapter in esports history!
Witness the world’s top clubs and players compete for over $70,000,000 in prize money and the coveted EWC Club Championship trophy.
Catch all the action live this summer!

videos.title: AngryBird vs. Leshar | Street Fighter 6 at EWC 25 - Day 4 - Third Place Match
videos.description:
The Esports World Cup is back to write the next chapter in esports history!
Witness the world’s top clubs and players compete for over $70,000,000 in prize money and the coveted EWC Club Championship trophy.
Catch all the action live this summer!

📍 Boulevard Riyadh City
🗓️ July 7th - August 24th, 2025
🎟️ https://webook.com/en/events/esports-...

▶ More at:
♦ EWC: https://esportsworldcup.com
♦ X: https://x.com/EWC_EN & https://x.com/EWC_Extra
♦ Instagram:   / ewc_en   &   / ewc_extra  
♦ TikTok:   / ewc_en&     / ewc_extra  
♦ Facebook:   / esportsworldcup  

#EsportsWorldCup #EWC25

videos.title: Blaz vs. Leshar | Street Fighter 6 at EWC 25 - Day 4 - Semifinals
videos.description:
The Esports World Cup is back to write the next chapter in esports history!
Witness the world’s top clubs and players compete for over $70,000,000 in prize money and the coveted EWC Club Championship trophy.
Catch all the action live this summer!

📍 Boulevard Riyadh City
🗓️ July 7th - August 24th, 2025
🎟️ https://webook.com/en/events/esports-...

▶ More at:
♦ EWC: https://esportsworldcup.com
♦ X: https://x.com/EWC_EN & https://x.com/EWC_Extra
♦ Instagram:   / ewc_en   &   / ewc_extra  
♦ TikTok:   / ewc_en&     / ewc_extra  
♦ Facebook:   / esportsworldcup  

#EsportsWorldCup #EWC25
